news.title: Apple Stock Closes at a New High. Earnings Could Change Everything.
news.summary: Apple shares rose 4% to $327.50, a new all-time closing high.  The Cyberspace Administration of China on Wednesday included Apple’s generative artificial intelligence on a list of newly approved providers.  Evercore ISI analyst Amit Daryanani wrote that the update clears the biggest regulatory hurdle for Apple Intelligence—the company’s AI software—in the world’s largest smartphone market.

news.title: Megacap Tech Lifts U.S. Stocks
news.summary: U.S. stocks edged higher Wednesday as gains in megacap technology names offset weakness in chip stocks.  PayPal  surged on reports of a takeover offer and another round of strong bank earnings kept Wall Street in an upbeat mood.  The S&P 500 added 28.81 points, or 0.38%, to 7572.40, while the Nasdaq Composite gained 162.22 points, or 0.62%, to 26269.23.
